task_completion.description: Verify the shipping origin location details (Country, State, ZIP, City) are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Shipping Origin' settings section, Country should be 'United States', Region/State should be 'Oregon', ZIP/Postal Code should be '97201', and City should be 'Portland'.

task_completion.description: Verify the shipping origin street address is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Shipping Origin' settings section, the Street Address field should contain '450 SW Morrison St'.

task_completion.description: Verify Flat Rate shipping is enabled with the correct title and method name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flat Rate' shipping methods section, 'Enabled' should be set to 'Yes', 'Title' should be 'Ground Shipping', and 'Method Name' should be 'Standard Delivery'.

task_completion.description: Verify Flat Rate shipping price, type, and sort order are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flat Rate' shipping methods section, 'Type' should be set to 'Per Order', 'Price' should be '7.49', and 'Sort Order' should be '10'.

task_completion.description: Verify Free Shipping is enabled with the correct minimum order amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Free Shipping' shipping methods section, 'Enabled' should be set to 'Yes', and 'Minimum Order Amount' should be '75'.

task_completion.description: Verify Free Shipping sort order is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Free Shipping' shipping methods section, 'Sort Order' should be '5'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configuration changes were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., a green banner stating 'You saved the configuration.') should be visible at the top of the Magento Admin panel.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento Admin web interface, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a functional web browser showing the Magento Admin panel, not a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: Verify the inputs appear genuine and not tampered with.
integrity.visual_evidence: The entered values should appear normally in the form fields without signs of DOM manipulation, inspect element tampering, or pasted text overlays.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Magento shipping origin configuration uses Country 'US', Region ID '49' (Oregon), ZIP '97201', City 'Portland'. Flat Rate type 'O' corresponds to 'Per Order' in the UI. A value of '1' for active status means 'Enabled' (Yes in the UI).
